name: coTfsEmcyResetList
title: coTfsEmcyResetList
description: This function deletes the internal list on which occurring emergency messages are stored.
It is possible to omit the nodeID parameter. In this case, the internally-stored value set with coTfsSetNodeId is used.

parameters.name: nodeID
parameters.description: All messages of the associated node-ID are deleted; for nodeID=0, all emergency messages of all nodes are deleted.
